market.advice: Broad uptrend intact — VIX 17.3 (falling from 19.2), SPY $745 above MA50 ($729), 58% breadth, only 2 distribution days. Today's macro driver: Apple-Intel partnership announced pre-market, accelerating a chip-equipment and foundry sweep. Financials (GS, MS, BK, C, NTRS, CFG, AFL, AIZ) continue their coordinated Stage 2 breakout on bank earnings expectations (Citi/GS/MS report July 14-15). Fed eliminated easing bias (hawkish headwind) but markets are shrugging it off — watch if sentiment shifts. Strategy: normal-to-aggressive sizing on cleanest setups (RSI under 68, VCP tight, RS new high); trim overbought names (RSI 78+) on first strength; do NOT initiate full size into earnings in the next 7 days (MU June 25).

picks.thesis: Analog Devices is the top setup of the day — VCP (5 contractions, tightest 3.1%), RSI 56 (room to run), EPS +110%, revenue +37%. TV: STRONG BUY (16/0). Near-breakout coiled spring at the $437 all-time high, direct Apple-Intel pipeline beneficiary.
risks: Elevated semi valuation; sector rotation risk
watch: Volume breakout above $437 52w-high confirms stage 2

picks.thesis: Texas Instruments is the cleanest analog/semi setup — VCP (5 contractions, 3.7%), RSI 54, RS new highs, EPS +31%, revenue +19%. TV: BUY (14/3). Industrial recovery story well underway. Earnings July 23 leave time to ride the pre-report drift.
risks: Earnings in 35 days — trim to half before report
watch: Reclaim $325 prior high confirms breakout above resistance

risks: Rate-sensitive; any hawkish surprise hurts the group
watch: Holds above $162 stop; RSI 68 — don't chase a sharp gap up

picks.thesis: SpaceX — NEW LISTING (June 2026, only 5 days of price history, $2.4T market cap). This is a thesis call, not a technical setup: Starlink satellite internet has 5M+ subscribers growing 50%+ YoY; Falcon 9 handles ~70% of global launches; Starship optionality is enormous. No TV rating yet (expected for fresh IPOs). Size very small (1-2% position). Users holding at $160.95 avg cost are currently in profit — hold with a wide stop.
risks: Extreme valuation ($2.4T, negative EPS, fwd PE -2018x)
Lock-up overhang
Elon Musk key-man and distraction risk
Only 5 days of history — no technical read
watch: Let it base 3-6 months; watch $160 IPO support level
